---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
---

## Education

- **PhD, Health Research and Policy** — Baylor University, Department of Economics
- **MS, Economics**
- **MHA, Health Administration**

## Honors & Awards

- [2025–26]{.year} — [Outstanding Dissertation Award](https://graduate.baylor.edu/news/story/2026/graduate-school-announces-2025-26-outstanding-dissertation-award-winners), Social Sciences — Baylor University Graduate School

## Experience

- [2025–present]{.year} — Assistant Professor
- [2022–2025]{.year} — PhD Student
- [2019–2022]{.year} — Chief of Managed Care and Program Analysis, RHCE, Germany
- [2018–2019]{.year} — Executive Officer, Madigan Army Medical Center
- [2015–2018]{.year} — Chief of Managed Care, Madigan Army Medical Center
- [2014–2015]{.year} — Administrative Resident, Group Health Cooperative
- [2005–2015]{.year} — Medical Services Officer, U.S. Army
